charlatan v0.4.1.92

  • Articles
    • Contributing to charlatan
  • Changelog

Create fake currencies

Source: R/currency.R
ch_currency.Rd

Create fake currencies

ch_currency(n = 1)

Arguments

n

(integer) number of things to get, any non-negative integer

See also

CurrencyProvider

Examples

ch_currency()

#> [1] "VUV"
ch_currency(10)

#>  [1] "YER" "MRO" "CAD" "GGP" "VUV" "CAD" "SHP" "SYP" "TVD" "KRW"
ch_currency(500)

#>   [1] "NOK" "MXN" "MZN" "NIO" "GHS" "UYU" "TTD" "TND" "BIF" "JMD" "MZN" "SVC"
#>  [13] "SRD" "BZD" "STD" "UYU" "FKP" "GHS" "RWF" "AMD" "MMK" "FJD" "AWG" "GYD"
#>  [25] "ERN" "AUD" "JOD" "NZD" "SBD" "NOK" "GGP" "AMD" "HTG" "PAB" "VUV" "ZMW"
#>  [37] "HTG" "RON" "BAM" "SHP" "HKD" "TMT" "HUF" "MNT" "BIF" "LTL" "DOP" "CRC"
#>  [49] "BAM" "TRY" "BRL" "ILS" "BWP" "MMK" "SOS" "GYD" "LAK" "UZS" "HKD" "EGP"
#>  [61] "SDG" "EUR" "AUD" "BWP" "ISK" "ZAR" "MYR" "AFN" "BZD" "KPW" "KMF" "FKP"
#>  [73] "DOP" "NZD" "UGX" "KMF" "JMD" "KWD" "MYR" "YER" "ILS" "PAB" "UAH" "KZT"
#>  [85] "JOD" "SOS" "STD" "LTL" "HKD" "GBP" "BHD" "CNY" "TVD" "CLP" "ARS" "LSL"
#>  [97] "SGD" "GEL" "KGS" "BZD" "BSD" "SGD" "WST" "UZS" "GHS" "LRD" "SLL" "MAD"
#> [109] "XOF" "EUR" "EGP" "JEP" "SEK" "RON" "AED" "BBD" "DKK" "CAD" "XAF" "PAB"
#> [121] "PKR" "HTG" "TND" "IQD" "BHD" "ALL" "XOF" "NIO" "CZK" "SCR" "UAH" "LKR"
#> [133] "BSD" "PGK" "AFN" "MRO" "AUD" "KYD" "RUB" "BHD" "MWK" "SBD" "PHP" "KES"
#> [145] "LTL" "XPF" "SPL" "UAH" "KPW" "TTD" "TND" "IQD" "KMF" "SAR" "BYR" "MRO"
#> [157] "BOB" "TMT" "PKR" "ETB" "BND" "DOP" "DZD" "SBD" "CVE" "EUR" "HNL" "TZS"
#> [169] "YER" "JOD" "BYR" "MUR" "ZWD" "PEN" "YER" "JOD" "JOD" "XOF" "VUV" "HUF"
#> [181] "NAD" "CDF" "PAB" "QAR" "PEN" "SHP" "GYD" "NOK" "ETB" "TWD" "ANG" "DKK"
#> [193] "NZD" "MXN" "JPY" "FKP" "CUP" "TMT" "LKR" "PEN" "USD" "AMD" "BRL" "TVD"
#> [205] "DJF" "AFN" "GBP" "LAK" "GEL" "ETB" "CDF" "AMD" "MWK" "GYD" "ETB" "ZMW"
#> [217] "COP" "NPR" "BZD" "SEK" "VND" "KPW" "BWP" "SPL" "KZT" "MOP" "MKD" "RSD"
#> [229] "BOB" "FJD" "YER" "CUP" "ARS" "BRL" "SZL" "IQD" "SYP" "AFN" "CHF" "GMD"
#> [241] "SEK" "KYD" "DKK" "HKD" "BYR" "AED" "NZD" "ERN" "MVR" "BRL" "PKR" "MDL"
#> [253] "CUP" "CDF" "NAD" "JPY" "FJD" "RUB" "MAD" "CUP" "KYD" "YER" "GMD" "BZD"
#> [265] "AED" "PAB" "FKP" "LKR" "NAD" "ZMW" "FJD" "BGN" "CUC" "HUF" "USD" "USD"
#> [277] "XAF" "SHP" "XPF" "PYG" "ZWD" "RON" "JEP" "XCD" "MWK" "DOP" "STD" "DOP"
#> [289] "NIO" "SDG" "CUP" "BHD" "BYR" "AWG" "XPF" "HTG" "CLP" "UZS" "RUB" "BBD"
#> [301] "AZN" "IRR" "SPL" "CAD" "VND" "HKD" "BND" "BBD" "ETB" "XPF" "BIF" "GGP"
#> [313] "AMD" "CUC" "SHP" "HRK" "BGN" "AED" "BSD" "PAB" "BRL" "BDT" "KHR" "ISK"
#> [325] "CHF" "KWD" "MWK" "DOP" "MMK" "ILS" "KHR" "VUV" "SAR" "XAF" "MNT" "MKD"
#> [337] "UGX" "KHR" "ISK" "RON" "RSD" "HKD" "MYR" "BAM" "CDF" "MZN" "AWG" "SEK"
#> [349] "UGX" "BDT" "EGP" "SRD" "HNL" "CUP" "XDR" "UZS" "AZN" "GEL" "ALL" "MZN"
#> [361] "CRC" "KRW" "LAK" "GHS" "GEL" "WST" "UAH" "TZS" "LAK" "ALL" "ANG" "ARS"
#> [373] "KES" "BYR" "ZAR" "ILS" "MYR" "CDF" "HRK" "ZAR" "UAH" "JPY" "TZS" "INR"
#> [385] "PHP" "HRK" "KYD" "CVE" "DKK" "NGN" "BGN" "XCD" "IQD" "MMK" "SPL" "BOB"
#> [397] "SCR" "CUP" "CVE" "AWG" "NAD" "AFN" "HKD" "LBP" "PKR" "MVR" "WST" "LTL"
#> [409] "KPW" "HRK" "PYG" "CLP" "ZAR" "AUD" "DJF" "PKR" "HRK" "COP" "ERN" "MMK"
#> [421] "KHR" "VUV" "GBP" "LAK" "BDT" "SBD" "JPY" "MRO" "HRK" "SAR" "ANG" "GYD"
#> [433] "CLP" "MDL" "SCR" "TZS" "LAK" "LBP" "SRD" "BZD" "MAD" "ZMW" "SDG" "AWG"
#> [445] "CUC" "MYR" "SOS" "ALL" "JEP" "USD" "BDT" "FKP" "HNL" "NOK" "DOP" "NAD"
#> [457] "PKR" "MVR" "GHS" "ALL" "JEP" "KRW" "RWF" "MYR" "ZMW" "VUV" "NGN" "NGN"
#> [469] "XOF" "BIF" "HUF" "SBD" "IMP" "NAD" "SVC" "IMP" "ZAR" "JMD" "TTD" "SOS"
#> [481] "JMD" "VUV" "LTL" "FKP" "JEP" "PYG" "EUR" "PHP" "XPF" "RON" "ANG" "BRL"
#> [493] "VEF" "EUR" "GIP" "HUF" "BGN" "LKR" "HKD" "FJD"
